case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO., vs. VOLVIK, DORA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT VOLVIK, DORA DOES 1 THROUGH 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-04-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-13-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 7/5/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
